title: xeronemataceae
intro: The xeronemataceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic grouping that comprises a diverse range of species, often characterized by their ability to thrive in dry environments. Xeronemataceae includes plants with adaptations such as succulent leaves or stems, allowing them to conserve water in arid conditions. This family is often found in regions with Mediterranean or subtropical climates, where drought tolerance is essential for survival.
